mapper.insert: insert into bi_push_record (subscription_id, push_at, status, retry_count, create_time, remark) values (#{subscriptionId}, #{pushAt}, #{status}, #{retryCount}, #{createTime}, #{remark})
mapper.select: select push_at from bi_push_record where subscription_id = #{subscriptionId} and status = 'SUCCESS' order by push_at desc limit 1
